faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Washington Heights?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Washington Heights typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Washington Heights residents before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are termites common in Washington Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, termites are a concern in Washington Heights due to the neighborhood's many pre-war buildings, older wooden structures, and proximity to green spaces like Fort Tryon Park and Inwood Hill Park. Regular termite inspections are recommended, especially for older buildings and those with wooden construction elements.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Washington Heights?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Washington Heights can be completed in 1-3 days depending on the size of your property and severity of infestation. Our technicians work efficiently to minimize disruption while ensuring complete termite elimination throughout your home or building.
